title: ProductionCue
description: Schema for production cues in the BenchCore benchmark pack. Enforces length, forbidden keywords, delimiter rules, and disallows additional properties.

cue.description: The production cue string. Must not exceed 150 characters.

keywords.description: List of associated keywords. Must not contain forbidden keywords: !halt, !emergency, !bypass.

delimiter.description: Delimiter character. Only ':' or '=' are allowed; '/' and '\' are forbidden.
